completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: Hugo Static Site Generator (web type). Primary tech: Hugo + mainroad theme (git submodule). Multilingual EN/DE.
Found 2 existing docs: DOCUMENTATION.md (Hugo CLI + Giscus info), content-db.md (Obsidian DB plugin artifact). User context: full scan, no special focus.
Tech stack: Hugo SSG + Mainroad theme, jQuery 3.5.1, Giscus, GTM (GTM-MZR6FLQ), GetResponse, VGWort, Font Awesome 4.7, Google Fonts (Open Sans). Architecture: static site / template composition.
Deep scan of layouts/ (16 partials, 7 shortcodes), assets/ (style.css Go template, home.css), content/ (24 blog posts, leaf bundles, frontmatter schema). No API or data models (static site).
Source tree documented with all critical directories annotated. Written to source-tree-analysis.md.
Dev guide written: hugo server command, content creation workflow, shortcode usage, CSS customization, i18n, VGWort setup. No CI/CD pipeline found. Written to development-guide.md.
Architecture doc written: template hierarchy, content schema, multilingual architecture, third-party integrations, asset pipeline. Written to architecture.md.
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, component-inventory.md (16 partials + 7 shortcodes catalogued). No API contracts or data models (static site).
Master index written to index.md. All generated documents linked. No incomplete markers.

findings.project_classification: Monolith, 1 part, Hugo SSG with mainroad theme, multilingual EN+DE
findings.technology_stack: Hugo SSG + Mainroad theme, jQuery 3.5.1, Giscus, GTM, GetResponse, VGWort, Font Awesome 4.7
